meta.project: Fitness Trainer’s Client Tracking and Progress Management Platform

product_overview: A web-first trainer platform to let fitness trainers manage clients, build programs (section-based), log sessions and track progress with dashboards and reports. The frontend is React/TypeScript and integrates with backend APIs for authentication, program management, scheduling, logging and analytics.
core_goals: Enable trainers to securely sign in and manage multiple clients from a single dashboard.
Provide a section-based program builder so trainers can create reusable templates and assign programs to clients.
Support fast in-session logging (sets, reps, weight, RPE) and automatic session summary generation to share with clients.
Offer calendar scheduling and a client list for easy appointment management.
Present progress and analytics (metrics, trend graphs, session summaries) to help trainers and clients track development.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign in, sign out, and session management for trainers and clients (supports email/password and Google sign-in).
user_flows: Navigate to /signin -> Enter email and password -> Click Sign In button -> See /trainer/dashboard
Navigate to /signin -> Enter invalid email or password -> Click Sign In button -> See inline error message on /signin and remain on /signin
Navigate to /signin -> Click Google login -> Complete Google consent -> Receive session and redirect -> See /trainer/dashboard

features.name: Dashboard
features.description: Overview for trainers: upcoming appointments, quick stats (clients, adherence), alerts and quick actions (FAB to add new entities).
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/dashboard -> See appointment card for today and top-level stats widgets -> Click client from list -> Navigate to /trainer/clients/:id
Navigate to /trainer/dashboard -> Data for a widget is missing -> See 'missing data' alert and 'Sync' or 'Retry' affordance on /trainer/dashboard

features.name: Client Management
features.description: Create, view and update client profiles (health info, goals, metrics) and quickly access a client's program, calendar and logs.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/clients -> Click Add client -> Fill name, email and basic profile fields -> Click Save -> See new client in list on /trainer/clients
Navigate to /trainer/clients -> Click a client entry -> Navigate to /trainer/clients/:id -> See client profile details and metrics
Navigate to /trainer/clients -> Click Add client -> Submit with missing required field (email) -> See validation error on /trainer/clients and client not created

features.name: Program Management (section-based)
features.description: Build programs composed of weeks/days, sections and exercises; save templates; assign programs to clients to generate session schedules.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/programs -> View list of programs -> Click Create new program -> Fill program name and duration -> Add sections to program -> Add exercises to sections -> Click Save -> See created program in list on /trainer/programs
Navigate to /trainer/programs -> Click Create new program -> Leave required field blank (name) -> Click Save -> See validation error on /trainer/programs indicating missing name
Navigate to /trainer/programs -> Select a template -> Click Assign -> Enter client_id and start_date -> Confirm assign -> System creates sessions and populates /trainer/calendar for that client

features.name: Exercise Library
features.description: Central exercise catalog (global library) where trainers can add/edit exercises with tracking fields to reuse in programs.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/library/exercises -> See exercise list -> Click Add exercise -> Enter name, muscle groups and tracking fields -> Click Save -> See new exercise in /trainer/library/exercises
Navigate to /trainer/library/exercises -> Click Add exercise -> Upload invalid media format -> See upload error and guidance on allowed formats on /trainer/library/exercises

features.name: Scheduling & Calendar
features.description: Calendar view for trainers to create and manage training sessions and appointments (monthly view + highlights for sessions).
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/calendar -> See month view with highlighted session days -> Click a date -> Click Create session -> Select client and time -> Click Save -> See session appear on /trainer/calendar
Navigate to /trainer/calendar -> Create session that conflicts with existing session -> See conflict warning on /trainer/calendar and option to Reschedule or Cancel

features.name: Session Logging (Workout tracking)
features.description: Create sessions, record per-exercise sets (actual weight, reps, RPE), auto-save session summaries and allow trainer feedback notes.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/sessions/new -> Fill session details and assign client -> Click Create -> Navigate to /trainer/sessions/:id/log -> For first exercise fill actual_weight, actual_reps and actual_rpe -> Click Save Set -> Repeat for all sets -> Click Complete Session -> See generated session summary and saved record under /trainer/session-log
Navigate to /trainer/sessions/:id/log -> Fill set details -> Network error occurs when saving -> See transient save error and 'Retry' button on /trainer/sessions/:id/log

features.name: Session Log Viewer & History
features.description: View past session logs and drill down to per-set details for review and to build progress graphs.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/session-log -> See list of session summaries -> Click a session entry -> Navigate to /trainer/sessions/:id/log -> See per-exercise sets and notes
Navigate to /trainer/session-log -> Select session without saved sets -> See message 'No recorded sets for this session' and guidance to add missing logs on /trainer/session-log

features.name: Reports & Analytics
features.description: Trend graphs and reports that show client progress over time (body metrics, volume/tonnage, session frequency) to support decisions.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/reports -> Select 'All clients' or a specific client -> Choose metric (weight, body fat) and date range -> Click Generate -> See trend graph and summary insights on /trainer/reports
Navigate to /trainer/reports -> Select metric with no data for chosen date range -> See 'insufficient data' message and suggestion to record client metrics on /trainer/clients/:id

features.name: Settings & Profile
features.description: Trainer account and application settings: update profile, avatar, notification preferences and client-related defaults.
user_flows: Navigate to /trainer/settings -> Update display name and notification preferences -> Click Save -> See confirmation and updated values on /trainer/settings
Navigate to /trainer/settings -> Try to upload an oversized avatar image -> See file-size validation error on /trainer/settings and avatar not updated

features.name: Program Management
features.description: Create and manage workout programs with sections and exercises
